insights:
The single best deal is DeepSeek V4 Flash (Max), which achieves an intelligence score of 47 out of 60 while costing only $0.06 per million blended tokens. This delivers a value score of 783.3—nearly 15% higher than the next closest competitor. It also offers a massive 1000K context window and a respectable 135 tokens per second throughput, making it suitable for long-context tasks without sacrificing speed. For developers seeking maximum intelligence per dollar, this model is the clear frontrunner.
